column12: I understand that all boxers have to weigh in on Monday 7th July.
column13: I accept that boxers under 50kg use 12oz gloves, 50-69kg use 14oz gloves and 70kg plus use 16oz gloves. Headgear, protectors (male and female) and mouthguards MUST be worn during spars.

column11: Ali is the Current Boy 1 Irish National champion 31kg
Weight possibly heavier, returning from injury.
In tournament the weekend before we leave, bouts will be more than marked in.
Only available on Tuesday and Wednesday
Has kickboxing experience around 14/15 bouts record unknown, it was around 8 years ago.
